title: Redeploy backend canister to restore running status

requirements.text: Redeploy the backend canister (bskla-eiaaa-aaaaan-q4qba-cai) without modifying any existing backend code, so that the canister returns to a running state and all canister calls (including whoAmI) are functional again.

quotes: Tolong lakukan redeploy backend canister dan pastikan statusnya running.
Proyek ini dibuat dan dikelola sepenuhnya melalui Caffeine. Saya tidak pernah deploy manual via dfx.

acceptanceCriteria: Backend canister bskla-eiaaa-aaaaan-q4qba-cai is in running state after deployment.
Calling whoAmI from the frontend returns a valid principal without IC0508 error.
No existing backend Motoko code is modified — only redeployment is performed.
All previously working canister calls continue to function as before.

constraints: Do not modify any existing backend Motoko code in backend/main.mo.
Do not change any frontend code.
This is a redeploy-only operation — no schema or logic changes.
nonGoals: Modifying backend business logic or data models.
